query:
SELECT 
  id,
  worker_id,
  work_date,
  DATE_FORMAT(work_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as formatted_date,
  base_amount,
  locked_batch_id
FROM worker_daily_finance 
WHERE work_date >= '2026-02-06' AND work_date <= '2026-02-06';
command:

  DATE_FORMAT(work_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as formatted_date,
  base_amount,
